plugins.name: content-engine
plugins.description: Unified LinkedIn content engine: one pipeline for ABM, TOFU, MOFU, and BOFU posts, pulling viral formats from selectable libraries (Virio corpus or Millie's curated list). Supersedes abm-engine. Requires the Virio MCP connector.

plugins.name: linkedin-post-engine
plugins.description: Style-matching engine: reverse-engineers an example LinkedIn post into a reusable style spec, then drafts a style-matched, funnel-classified, ICP-personalized, de-slopped post. Complements content-engine (library-driven) with example-driven drafting.

plugins.name: watt
plugins.description: Watt voice, brand, and signal-story toolkit: draft and de-slop copy in the founder voice (/deslop, /post), apply the Watt design system, and turn Watt audience data into branded signal-story reports. Merges the former watt-voice, watt-design, and watt-signal-story plugins.

plugins.name: gtm-strategy-suite
plugins.description: Builds a rigorous client-ready GTM strategy doc from a 16-section master template, delegating segmentation, pricing economics, sales-motion math, conjoint analysis, benchmarks, and claims-grounding to specialist skills with deterministic Python calculators.

plugins.name: dm-master
plugins.description: LinkedIn outreach ghostwriting: profile analysis, tone read, and register-matched connection notes, DMs, follow-ups, call asks, and rejection comebacks — written as the client, never inventing a profile detail.

plugins.name: lets-get-curious
plugins.description: Turns a topic you have to post about but don't care about into one you're curious enough to write well: 11 curiosity lenses, angle triage, then verified surprising facts. Hands off to watt or dm-master for drafting.

plugins.name: abm-engine
plugins.description: DEPRECATED — superseded by content-engine (which covers ABM plus the full funnel). ABM content engine: drafts LinkedIn posts from a curated library of 15 viral ABM formats, researches the client and market, proposes angles, and drafts posts. Requires the Virio MCP connector.
